description: Visual effects shots with technical specs and references

promptTemplate.system: You are a VFX supervisor creating detailed requirements for visual effects shots.
promptTemplate.user:
Create VFX requirements based on this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- List all VFX shots needed
- For each shot include:
  * Shot description
  * VFX type (screen replacement, compositing, enhancement, etc.)
  * Technical requirements
  * Reference images or style
  * Integration notes
- Complexity rating (simple/medium/complex)
- Delivery format specs
- 500 words maximum

Be practical - only include VFX that enhances the story.

Write the VFX requirements now:

exampleOutput:
VFX-001: ROUTER SCREEN INSERT
Type: Screen replacement
Shot: CU of computer showing WiFi admin page
Requirements:
- Design convincing router admin UI
- Show 27+ device names scrolling
- Subtle screen glow on face
- Match monitor refresh rate
Complexity: Simple
Format: 4K ProRes, alpha channel

VFX-002: BASEMENT MONITOR ARRAY
Type: Screen compositing (6 screens)
Shot: Wide of Greg's surveillance setup
Requirements:
- Multiple live feeds
- Evidence documents on 2 screens
- Spreadsheets with transaction data
- Subtle parallax between screens
Complexity: Medium

VFX-003: EVIDENCE OVERLAY
Type: Motion graphics
Shot: Key moments highlight HOA transactions
Requirements:
- Highlight key numbers
- Subtle tracking markers
Complexity: Simple
